heading: Application of treaties and other international agreements
label: 852 Application of treaties and other international agreements
text: Nothing in the Single Convention on Narcotic Drugs, the Convention on Psychotropic Substances, or other treaties or international agreements shall be construed to limit the provision of treatment, education, or rehabilitation as alternatives to conviction or criminal penalty for offenses involving any drug or other substance subject to control under any such treaty or agreement.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on date the Convention on Psychotropic Substances enters into force in the United States [], see , set out as a note under .July 15, 1980section 112 of Pub. L. 95–633section 801a of this title
